contract_claim: Duck-typed check `type(message).__name__ == "ResultMessage"` is fragile. If the SDK renames or subclasses the type, cost accumulation silently stops. No cross-file verification possible without inspecting claude_agent_sdk.
observed_behavior: Duck-typed check `type(message).__name__ == "ResultMessage"` is fragile. If the SDK renames or subclasses the type, cost accumulation silently stops. No cross-file verification possible without inspecting claude_agent_sdk.
